CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2018 Continued To Feb-13-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Motion For Preliminary Approval Of Class Settlement
Off Calendar Oct-15-2018 Continued To Dec-12-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Kyle Norderhaug, Esq. of Blumenthal Nordrehaug Bhowmik De Blouw LLP, 858.551.1223 ext 1002, appearing for the Plaintiff;
Sybil Renick, Esq. of Prather Law Offices, 415.881.7774, appearing for the Defendant.

PLAINTIFF JULIO HERENCIA'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY APPROVAL OF CLASS SETTLEMENT.

Matter called, ARGUMENT/discussions are held with regard to procedural issues as to compensation, estimates of the expected recovery for class members, and the "cy pres" DIR (Division of Industrial Relations) fund. Further argument regarding the calculations that lead to the PAGA allocation are also held.

At the conclusion of argument, Mr. Norderhaug stated that he could provide the Court with the calculations regarding damages as well as the PAGA calculations. The Court also requested that Mr. Norderhaug provide clarification as to the following statements, "Defendant provided class counsel with necessary information. Plaintiff analyzed the data." Mr. Norderhaug stated that they could provide the Court with details. Brief discussions regarding a two month continuance are held. Discussions conclude, the Court continued the motion to December 12, 2018. Mr. Norderhaug will prepare a supplemental filing addressing/clarifying the issues raised by the Court today. Mr. Norderhaug noted that the parties could rework the settlement agreement in an attempt to satisfy the Court.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/HEK)
